summary: Frontend-only testing for TQS UI highlighting feature (iteration 67). Code review verified all TQS display elements are correctly implemented in LiveAlertsPanel.jsx and AICommandPanel.jsx. UI testing confirmed app loads correctly with trade cards visible. No live TQS-enriched alerts were present during testing (market may be closed or no high-TQS setups detected).

AlertCard_emerald_ring_styling.details: ring-2 ring-emerald-500/50 shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 applied when isHighTQS

HIGH_QUALITY_badge.details: Badge with Zap icon, gradient background, and animate-pulse when isHighTQS

Key_Factors_panel.details: Shows key factors in emerald bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/20 panel when isHighTQS && tqs_key_factors.length > 0

getTQSColor_function.details: Returns text-emerald-400 for A grades, text-blue-400 for B, text-yellow-400 for C, text-orange-400 for D, text-red-400 for F

AICommandPanel_TQS_display.details: PipelineOpportunityCard shows TQS score with color: emerald >=70, yellow >=50, orange <50

AICommandPanel_HQ_badge.details: Shows HQ badge with Zap icon when tqs_is_high_quality

ui_testing_results.command_tab: PASS - Shows AI Trading Assistant with trade cards (RCKT, CVX visible)
ui_testing_results.market_tab: PASS - Shows scanner alerts (MVIS, KOS, CRGY with M2M badges)
ui_testing_results.trade_cards: PASS - Display Entry, Target, Stop prices and R:R ratios
ui_testing_results.tqs_display_live: NOT TESTED - No live alerts with TQS data during testing window

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 TQS UI features are correctly implemented in code
isHighTQS check is comprehensive: tqs_is_high_quality OR tqs_score >= 70
getTQSColor correctly maps grades to Tailwind color classes
HIGH QUALITY badge uses gradient (from-emerald-500/30 to-teal-500/30) with Zap icon and animate-pulse
Key Factors panel limited to first 3 factors with slice(0, 2) for display

success_rate.ui_testing: 100% (app loads, navigation works, trade cards display)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified TQS UI highlighting code implementation. All 8 features (isHighTQS check, emerald ring, HIGH QUALITY badge, TQS score/grade display, Key Factors panel, getTQSColor, AICommandPanel TQS display, HQ badge) are correctly implemented. Live testing could not verify actual TQS display as no high-TQS alerts were generated during testing. The backend _enrich_alert_with_tqs method populates TQS data when alerts are created.
